testcase.name: test_thin_elements_description

failure.message: AssertionError: Thin elements desc should mention 'thin' or 'narrow': Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth assert ('thin' in 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' or 'narrow' in 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth') + where 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0> = 'Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth'.lower + and 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0> = 'Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth'.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_diameter_q_factor.py:441: in test_thin_elements_description assert "thin" in desc.lower() or "narrow" in desc.lower(), f"Thin elements desc should mention 'thin' or 'narrow': {desc}" E AssertionError: Thin elements desc should mention 'thin' or 'narrow': Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth E assert ('thin' in 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' or 'narrow' in 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth') E + where 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0> = 'Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth'.lower E + and 'standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfe9ea988e7f0> = 'Standard elements (0.250") — typical bandwidth'.lower
